title.en: In the following days, Ye Tian was here to comp...

content.en:
His ranking on the Blood Battle List has increased, and Ye Tian's cultivation time in Dao Yunhai has naturally increased a lot.

At present, Ye Tian could cultivate in the Dao Yun Sea for nearly six thousand eternal years.

In the following days, Ye Tian was here to comprehend other Dao changes.

Before you know it, another thousand eternal years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally mastered the changes in the Dao of Time to three or three billion, forming a perfect imprint.

This time the perfect mark was formed, and it also attracted the attention of other half-step perfect masters.

"What, Ye Tian actually mastered the Time Perfect Mark again!"

"How could it be so fast? He only mastered the Spatial Perfection Mark not long ago, and he mastered the Time Perfection Mark so quickly!!

"Maybe it's because he's good at the many changes in the way of time and space, and before he came to the Blood War Capital, he was very close to three or three billion changes, so he mastered the two perfect seals so quickly!"

"Even so, Ye Tian is too demonic! I just took a look, Ye Tian has reached the tenth place on the blood battle list!"

After entering the Blood War Capital for thousands of eternity, he entered the top ten of the Blood War List, and such a speed of progress shocked the high-level leaders of the Blood War Capital.

Soon, the high-level leaders of the Blood War City gathered.

"I underestimated Ye Tian's potential a little, but I didn't expect him to enter the tenth place on the Blood Battle List in only a few thousand eternal years!"

"Everyone, my Ye Tian of the Daoless Tower has entered the tenth place on the Blood Battle List, he should be qualified to enter the Zhendao Alien Realm, right?"

"It is indeed qualified, any half-step perfectionist who enters the top ten of the Blood Battle List will have a chance to enter the Terra. "

"Since that's the case, then I'll go and inform Ye Tian. "

Shortly thereafter.

Ye Tian saw a perfect controller of the Blood War Capital, the Lord of Xuanhuang!

"I've seen the Lord of Xuanhuang!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

He knew that this perfect master, one of the ten capital masters of the Blood War Capital, and also a perfect master of the Daoless Tower, his status was much higher than that of the Lord of Blood, and he was also one of the high-level leaders of the Daoless Tower.

As for how powerful he was, Ye Tian didn't know very well, but he was definitely far beyond the average perfect controller.

"Ye Tian, you are very good, you have greatly increased the face of our Wudao Tower, this time I am here to inform you of a good thing!" said the Lord of Xuanhuang with a smile.

"Good thing?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled, but he was also full of expectations.

I saw the Lord of Xuanhuang say: "You have broken into the tenth place on the blood battle list, so you have the opportunity to enter the other realm of the town." "

"What's that?"

Ye Tian said he didn't know.

The Lord of Xuanhuang explained: "Zhendao Alien Realm is a special secret realm time and space in Zhendao Mountain, and this time and space is also the most valuable treasure land in Zhendao Mountain. For example, the value of the perfect treasure should be clear, and the town of the road will give birth to the perfect treasure, and the best perfect treasure found from the town of the road is the high-level perfect treasure. "

"Perfect Treasure, so if I enter the Terraity Realm, I will also have a chance to find the Perfect Treasure?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The value of any perfect treasure is unimaginable, much higher than his whole body worth.

"Yes!" the Lord of Xuanhuang nodded, "However, the major forces have very strict control over the Zhendao Alien Realm, so after discussion, the top ten of the Blood Battle List are only allowed to enter the Zhendao Alien Realm once, and they are only allowed to stay in it for an eternal age, in fact, they can only stay for such a long time, and once they exceed this time, they will be excluded." "

Immediately, the Lord of Xuanhuang gave Ye Tian a token: "This is the Town Dao Order, you can use it to enter the Town Dao Alien Realm." I suggest that you enter the Terraity Realm now, because the Terraity Realm is not only a perfect treasure, but also a natural cultivation treasure land, which contains many good things, of course, there are some dangers, but the danger is not great. Each half-step perfect master enters a different area of the town, so you don't have to worry about the previous half-step perfect master entering and taking everything inside. "

"Thank you, Lord Xuanhuang!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Go hard, and strive to reach the first place in the blood battle list!"

The Lord of Xuanhuang said.

Subsequently, the Lord of Xuanhuang left.

And after Ye Tian refined the Zhendao Order, he sensed a special space-time area, which was located in the depths of the Zhendao Mountain, if he didn't have such a Zhendao Order, he wouldn't be able to enter there.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian urged the Zhendao Order, and his body merged with the Zhendao Order, crossing endless time and space, breaking through the blockade of the power of Zhendao Mountain, and entering the Zhendao Alien Realm.

......

"Come in!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this moment, he was in an incomparably turbid space-time region, where the suppression was stronger than that of Zhendao Mountain, but the energy was incomparably abundant.

"I hope I can find the perfect treasure!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

After all, as long as he finds a perfect treasure, even if it is a low-level perfect treasure, he will earn it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian was here to look for the perfect treasure, and if he found other resources, he would also take them one by one.

I have to say that there are still a lot of resources here.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian found a lot of resources, although these resources are not of much help, but if there are many of them, they can still improve their strength a little.

"A creature comparable to a half-step perfect master!"

Ye Tian sensed with his copying talent that the strength of the other party was not strong, and it was comparable to an ordinary half-step perfect controller, not Ye Tian's opponent.

Soon.

Ye Tian approached the other party, this was a creature that looked like an ape, its eyes were blood-red, and it exuded a black aura all over its body.

In an instant, Ye Tian fought with the other party.

In just a few moves, Ye Tian used the top-notch perfect control technique Ten Thousand Dao Blade to kill the other party.

this day.

Ye Tian found a purple-gold tree, exuding terrifying ability fluctuations, and there was also a terrifying giant snake comparable to the level of a half-step perfect controller, whose strength and life level were no less than the illusory snake that Ye Tian had encountered.

Ye Tian fought with him for a while, and then killed him.

"What kind of tree is this?"

Ye Tian could feel that the body of the tree contained a very special liquid substance, and it contained powerful and special energy.

Burst!

Ye Tian cut open the body of the tree, and a trace of purple-gold liquid substance flowed out, which was caught by Ye Tian and collected.

Immediately, Ye Tian took a sip.

Rumble!!!!

Terrifying energy poured into the root of Ye Tian's controlled body, impacting the chain of control.

Soon, Ye Tian broke through a control chain.

"This treasure actually helped to break the chain of control, and now it is easy to break one, the value of this liquid substance is too good!"

Ye Tian immediately dug out the giant tree and put it into the void ball.
